strategies.label: Disable public SSM document sharing

dependency_checks.message: Publicly shared SSM document consumers may lose access after enforcement.

warnings: Shared public documents will no longer be publicly available.
strategies.impact_text: Public sharing of SSM documents will be blocked.
strategies.decision_rationale: Wave 2 compatibility defaulted to the single compatible profile 'ssm_disable_public_document_sharing' for strategy 'ssm_disable_public_document_sharing'.

strategies.label: Keep public sharing (exception path)

fields.description: How long should this exception remain active?

fields.placeholder: Describe the temporary business or operational constraint.

dependency_checks.message: Public document sharing remains enabled and may expose sensitive runbooks.

warnings: Publicly shareable SSM documents can expose sensitive operational content.
strategies.impact_text: Public sharing of SSM documents will remain enabled while the exception path is active.
strategies.decision_rationale: Wave 2 compatibility defaulted to the single compatible profile 'ssm_keep_public_sharing_exception' for strategy 'ssm_keep_public_sharing_exception'.

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_high__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'exception_review'. Risk is high and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.00, privilege_level=1.00, internet_exposure=0.80, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is incomplete, so the recommendation remains conservative and advisory unless policy overrides it.
